$schema_note: Plan v5+ R1 Golden Set v0.1 DRAFT — 30/40 entries. Pending domain expert review per plan §R1 'Curation Sources Hard Constraints': content sourced from academic finance literature only, NOT reverse-engineered from this project's alphas table. Each entry includes source paper / theoretical paradigm / known limitations.
$brain_field_disclaimer: Field aliases used in expression_template need region-adapter mapping (Plan v5+ §R7-1). E.g. 'eps' on USA/TOP3000 has no direct match — anl4_af_eps_value or fnd6_newa1v1300_epsfi etc. are real names, see docs/datafields_snapshot_v1.md.

core_anchors.statement: 低估值股票(P/E、P/B 比值低)在 12-36 月持有期获得正超额收益
core_anchors.source_paper: Fama, Eugene F. & French, Kenneth R. (1992). The Cross-Section of Expected Stock Returns. Journal of Finance, 47(2), 427-465.
core_anchors.known_limitations: Value premium has shown extended underperformance windows (notably 2015-2020). Sensitive to industry composition. Earnings yield (E/P) form preferred when P/E undefined for negative earnings.

core_anchors.statement: 盈利能力高的公司(高 ROE)长期跑赢盈利能力低的公司
core_anchors.source_paper: Novy-Marx, Robert (2013). The Other Side of Value: The Gross Profitability Premium. Journal of Financial Economics, 108(1), 1-28.
core_anchors.known_limitations: Definition matters — gross-profit-to-assets is more robust than net-margin variants. Vulnerable to one-time accounting items.

core_anchors.statement: 盈利质量(应计/现金流比例)反映会计盈余的可持续性,低应计公司未来收益更稳定
core_anchors.source_paper: Sloan, Richard G. (1996). Do Stock Prices Fully Reflect Information in Accruals and Cash Flows about Future Earnings? The Accounting Review, 71(3), 289-315.
core_anchors.known_limitations: Effect concentrated in extreme deciles. Premium has weakened post-2010 likely due to widespread arbitrage.

core_anchors.statement: 中期动量(过去 6-12 月收益)预测未来 1-12 月正收益,跳过最近 1 月规避短期反转
core_anchors.source_paper: Jegadeesh, Narasimhan & Titman, Sheridan (1993). Returns to Buying Winners and Selling Losers: Implications for Stock Market Efficiency. Journal of Finance, 48(1), 65-91.
core_anchors.known_limitations: Momentum crashes during sharp regime reversals (2009 Q1, 2020 March). Negatively correlated with value factor.

core_anchors.statement: 长期反转:过去 3-5 年表现差的股票未来 3-5 年跑赢表现好的(均值回归)
core_anchors.source_paper: De Bondt, Werner F. M. & Thaler, Richard (1985). Does the Stock Market Overreact? Journal of Finance, 40(3), 793-805.
core_anchors.known_limitations: Long lookback (3-5 years) may exceed BRAIN test_period for some regions (CHN history shorter). Risk vs. behavioral interpretations debated.

core_anchors.statement: 短期反转:过去 1-5 日表现极端的股票未来 1-5 日反向收敛
core_anchors.source_paper: Jegadeesh, Narasimhan (1990). Evidence of Predictable Behavior of Security Returns. Journal of Finance, 45(3), 881-898.
core_anchors.known_limitations: Driven by liquidity provision/inventory effects. Gross alphas typically positive but transaction costs erode net-of-cost performance for retail trading.

core_anchors.statement: 低波动股票获得风险调整后超额收益(低波动异象)
core_anchors.source_paper: Frazzini, Andrea & Pedersen, Lasse Heje (2014). Betting Against Beta. Journal of Financial Economics, 111(1), 1-25.
core_anchors.known_limitations: Concentrated in defensive sectors (utilities, staples). Underperforms in strong bull markets.

core_anchors.statement: 流动性差的股票要求流动性溢价,长期跑赢流动性高的股票
core_anchors.source_paper: Amihud, Yakov (2002). Illiquidity and Stock Returns: Cross-Section and Time-Series Effects. Journal of Financial Markets, 5(1), 31-56.
core_anchors.known_limitations: Highly correlated with size. Hard to scale due to capacity constraints in illiquid names.

core_anchors.statement: 小盘股长期获得超额收益(规模效应)
core_anchors.source_paper: Banz, Rolf W. (1981). The Relationship between Return and Market Value of Common Stocks. Journal of Financial Economics, 9(1), 3-18.
core_anchors.known_limitations: Size effect has weakened post-1980s discovery. Large dispersion vs. quality interaction (low-quality small caps underperform).

core_anchors.statement: 投资分析师 EPS 预期上调预测正收益(分析师修正动量)
core_anchors.source_paper: Stickel, Scott E. (1991). Common Stock Returns Surrounding Earnings Forecast Revisions. The Accounting Review, 66(2), 402-416.
core_anchors.known_limitations: Effect strongest within 5-10 days of revision; decays quickly. Analyst herding bias.

core_anchors.statement: 盈余意外正向预测后续收益漂移(PEAD - Post-Earnings-Announcement Drift)
core_anchors.source_paper: Bernard, Victor L. & Thomas, Jacob K. (1989). Post-Earnings-Announcement Drift: Delayed Price Response or Risk Premium? Journal of Accounting Research, 27, 1-36.
core_anchors.known_limitations: Requires precise event-window detection. Drift period 60-90 days; signal decays. Larger firms have weaker drift due to faster price discovery.

core_anchors.statement: 投资资本回报率高(高 ROIC)的公司长期跑赢
core_anchors.source_paper: Hou, Kewei, Xue, Chen & Zhang, Lu (2015). Digesting Anomalies: An Investment Approach. Review of Financial Studies, 28(3), 650-705.
core_anchors.known_limitations: EV requires market-cap data + debt; can be noisy for small caps. Sector-specific norms differ widely.

core_anchors.statement: 资产增长低的公司未来收益跑赢高资产增长公司(投资异象)
core_anchors.source_paper: Cooper, Michael J., Gulen, Huseyin & Schill, Michael J. (2008). Asset Growth and the Cross-Section of Stock Returns. Journal of Finance, 63(4), 1609-1651.
core_anchors.known_limitations: Captures M&A acquisitions / SEOs as well as organic growth — interpretation noisy. Premium concentrates in high-growth tail.

core_anchors.statement: 日内收益与隔夜收益分离:开盘价相对前收盘的 gap 包含未消化新闻信息
core_anchors.source_paper: Berkman, Henk, Koch, Paul D., Tuttle, Laura & Zhang, Ying Jenny (2012). Paying Attention: Overnight Returns and the Hidden Cost of Buying at the Open. Journal of Financial and Quantitative Analysis, 47(4), 715-741.
core_anchors.known_limitations: Quasi-T1 Q-GP-01 already encodes this. Effect strongest in liquid US large caps.

core_anchors.statement: 日内 close 在 high-low 区间中位置反映短期供需失衡
core_anchors.source_paper: Williams, Larry (1978). How I Made One Million Dollars Last Year Trading Commodities. (Williams %R indicator origin); academic treatment in Lo, Mamaysky & Wang (2000).
core_anchors.known_limitations: Quasi-T1 Q-ID-02 already encodes this. Sensitive to opening auction microstructure.

core_anchors.statement: 新闻情绪极端正向的股票短期上涨(过度反应),3-5 日反转
core_anchors.source_paper: Tetlock, Paul C. (2007). Giving Content to Investor Sentiment: The Role of Media in the Stock Market. Journal of Finance, 62(3), 1139-1168.
core_anchors.known_limitations: Sentiment scoring methodology varies wildly. NLP false positives common.

core_anchors.statement: 高股息收益率股票长期跑赢低股息(股息溢价)
core_anchors.source_paper: Litzenberger, Robert H. & Ramaswamy, Krishna (1979). The Effect of Personal Taxes and Dividends on Capital Asset Prices: Theory and Empirical Evidence. Journal of Financial Economics, 7(2), 163-195.
core_anchors.known_limitations: Dividend yield correlated with value factor. Tax-clientele effects make universality questionable.

core_anchors.statement: 趋势跟随:价格越接近 60 日最高点,越可能继续创新高
core_anchors.source_paper: George, Thomas J. & Hwang, Chuan-Yang (2004). The 52-Week High and Momentum Investing. Journal of Finance, 59(5), 2145-2176.
core_anchors.known_limitations: Anchoring bias interpretation. Subset of momentum factor — high correlation.

core_anchors.statement: 公司间相对销售/资产增长效率比绝对增长更预测性强
core_anchors.source_paper: Lakonishok, Josef, Shleifer, Andrei & Vishny, Robert W. (1994). Contrarian Investment, Extrapolation, and Risk. Journal of Finance, 49(5), 1541-1578.
core_anchors.known_limitations: Cross-sectional sales growth varies by sector capital intensity. Need group neutralization for comparability.

core_anchors.statement: 现金流收益率(CFO/Price)是 P/E 的稳健替代,信号在盈余被会计操控时更可靠
core_anchors.source_paper: Lakonishok, Shleifer & Vishny (1994). op. cit.
core_anchors.known_limitations: Quarterly CFO smoothing differs by sector. Negative CFO companies need filtering.

core_anchors.statement: 高换手率(volume/cap)反映关注度异常,与未来短期收益正相关
core_anchors.source_paper: Gervais, Simon, Kaniel, Ron & Mingelgrin, Dan H. (2001). The High-Volume Return Premium. Journal of Finance, 56(3), 877-919.
core_anchors.known_limitations: Effect 2-3 day window only. Confounded with news flow.

core_anchors.statement: 盈余增长加速度(2 阶差分)优于一阶增长率,在均值回归未反应时更预测
core_anchors.source_paper: Foster, George, Olsen, Chris & Shevlin, Terry (1984). Earnings Releases, Anomalies, and the Behavior of Security Returns. The Accounting Review, 59(4), 574-603.
core_anchors.known_limitations: Noisy at quarterly frequency. Requires non-extreme winsorization.

core_anchors.statement: 营运资本变化反映企业经营效率:营运资本增加 → 现金流转化率下降 → 未来收益受压
core_anchors.source_paper: Sloan (1996). op. cit. (extended in Richardson, Sloan, Soliman & Tuna 2005).
core_anchors.known_limitations: WC definition varies; need consistency across periods. Large M&A distorts.

core_anchors.statement: 行业内动量(同行业股票同向动量)比跨行业动量更稳定
core_anchors.source_paper: Moskowitz, Tobias J. & Grinblatt, Mark (1999). Do Industries Explain Momentum? Journal of Finance, 54(4), 1249-1290.
core_anchors.known_limitations: Industry-relative momentum captures sector rotation more than stock selection. Underperforms in regime breaks.

core_anchors.statement: 残差收益(去除市场/行业 beta 后的收益)动量比原始动量更稳健
core_anchors.source_paper: Blitz, David, Huij, Joop & Martens, Martin (2011). Residual Momentum. Journal of Empirical Finance, 18(3), 506-521.
core_anchors.known_limitations: Requires beta estimation window choice. Premium has compressed since 2010.

core_anchors.statement: 分析师覆盖度变化(新增/减少)预测后续公司基本面变化
core_anchors.source_paper: Hong, Harrison, Lim, Terence & Stein, Jeremy C. (2000). Bad News Travels Slowly: Size, Analyst Coverage, and the Profitability of Momentum Strategies. Journal of Finance, 55(1), 265-295.
core_anchors.known_limitations: Smaller stocks have noisier analyst coverage. Effect overlaps with size factor.

core_anchors.statement: 盘中波动率(realized volatility)预测后续短期收益负相关
core_anchors.source_paper: Ang, Andrew, Hodrick, Robert J., Xing, Yuhang & Zhang, Xiaoyan (2006). The Cross-Section of Volatility and Expected Returns. Journal of Finance, 61(1), 259-299.
core_anchors.known_limitations: Daily / weekly vol very different signals. Lottery-stock interpretation favored.

core_anchors.statement: 财务杠杆低的公司在熊市中跑赢(质量保护)
core_anchors.source_paper: Asness, Clifford S., Frazzini, Andrea & Pedersen, Lasse Heje (2019). Quality Minus Junk. Review of Accounting Studies, 24(1), 34-112.
core_anchors.known_limitations: Effect strongly regime-dependent (works in stress periods, underperforms in bull). Negative-equity firms break ratio.

core_anchors.statement: 成交量异常放大预测后续收益方向(放量信号)
core_anchors.source_paper: Lee, Charles M.C. & Swaminathan, Bhaskaran (2000). Price Momentum and Trading Volume. Journal of Finance, 55(5), 2017-2069.
core_anchors.known_limitations: Volume threshold sensitive. High-volume signal overlaps with news/earnings events.

core_anchors.statement: Piotroski F-score 综合质量信号优于单一比率,9 项盈利/资本/经营指标合成
core_anchors.source_paper: Piotroski, Joseph D. (2000). Value Investing: The Use of Historical Financial Statement Information to Separate Winners from Losers from High Book-to-Market Stocks. Journal of Accounting Research, 38, 1-41.
core_anchors.known_limitations: fscore_quality is BRAIN-aggregated; opaque to user but proven empirically. Only meaningful within high-B/P universe per original paper.
